steps.title: Identify the student's goal
steps.content: The student wants to “emphasize a similarity” between the Laas Geel and Dhagah Nabi Galay paintings.

steps.title: Find the choice showing both sites' shared feature
steps.content: D directly names both paintings and identifies what they share: they are both ancient rock art in Somaliland. The other three either isolate one site or contrast the two instead of emphasizing similarity. That matches choice D — D is correct.
